city.title: Portland, Maine
city.extract: Portland is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Maine. Its population was 68,408 at the 2020 census. The Greater Portland metropolitan area has a population of approximately 550,000 people, the most populous metropolitan area in Maine. It is the county seat of Cumberland County. Historically tied to commercial shipping, the marine economy, and light industry, Portland's economy in the 21st century relies mostly on the service sector. The Port of Portland is the second-largest tonnage seaport in the New England area as of 2019.

outreach.subject: Winter Maintenance Load
outreach.message:
Your team faces around 4 feet of snow every year, which means your maintenance crew is constantly dealing with winter-related issues. This snowfall, combined with ~185 rainy days, keeps your team reactive, not proactive. Your building requires constant attention to prevent and address damage.

At Moonlight Properties, a burst pipe during a cold snap can turn into a flooded lobby, and residents calling repeatedly because they haven't heard back on a work order, distracting your team from the actual fix. EliseAI keeps residents informed automatically so the team can focus on the fix, not the calls.

Worth a call?
